issues: code uses 'metro_area' column which is not in adapter contract (adapter returns only 'date' and 'quakes')
signal logic assumes data includes top 5 industrial metro areas but adapter contract does not provide this data or scope filtering
entry and exit logic is reversed: entry logic is before exit logic, so exit logic is unreachable

signal logic does not strictly follow spec intent: exit logic should trigger after 3 weeks or 4% price recovery, but code only checks exit after entry signal and does not handle holding state properly
